texto: A myth is a story that is "more than true." Many stories are true because one person, somewhere, at some time, lived it. It is based on fact. But a myth is more than true because it is lived by all of us, at some level. It's a story that connects and speaks to us all.
explicacao: Citação de Linda Seger sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “A myth is a story that is "more than true." Many stories are true because one person, somewhere, …” articula tempo, myth, story em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como story e verdade.
